narrative:
76 Ohio House district has 77,486 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.7% D−R vs -18.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
